headline: Here’s Why You Should Buy and Hold Uber Technologies (UBER) For the Next 5 Years
summary: ​The Street is Bullish on Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) ahead of its fiscal Q1 2026 earnings expected to be released on May 6. As of April 23, 86% of the 58 analysts covering the stock have a Buy rating, and the 12-month average price target suggests more than 40% upside from the current level. Uber […]

headline: Socure Q1 2026 Results: $340M+ Total ARR with 62% YoY Profitable Growth
summary: INCLINE VILLAGE, Nev., April 28, 2026--Socure, the leading infrastructure for identity and risk intelligence, today announced record first quarter results, closing Q1 2026 with 62% year-over-year total new annual recurring revenue growth, more than $31 million in new bookings and 134% net dollar retention across a base of more than 3,000 customers.

headline: Rivian CEO Makes $403 Million
summary: Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) CEO RJ Scaringe made $403 million last year. headline: Uber Rivian Robotaxis Put Autonomy At Center Of Growth Story
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has announced a major pivot toward autonomous vehicles through a new partnership with Rivian. The agreement includes plans to develop and potentially deploy tens of thousands of electric robotaxis on Uber’s platform over time. Management is publicly reframing autonomous vehicles as a core growth driver for Uber’s ride hailing marketplace. Uber sits at the center of app based mobility and delivery, connecting riders, drivers, couriers and merchants across its...
